class.name: JustAMCPTaskManager
class.brief_description: Tracks long-running MCP tasks and their results.

method.name: cancel_task
method.description: Marks an active task as cancelled unless it has already completed or failed, then returns the updated task dictionary.

method.name: complete_task
method.description: Marks an existing task as completed and stores the [code]content[/code] array from [param result] for [method get_task_result].

method.name: create_task
method.description: Creates a task entry with status [code]working[/code], a time-to-live in milliseconds, and default polling metadata. Returns an error if the task id already exists.

method.name: fail_task
method.description: Marks an existing task as failed and stores [param error] as the task status message.

method.name: get_task
method.description: Returns the current metadata for [param task_id], or an error dictionary if the task is unknown.

method.name: get_task_result
method.description: Returns the stored result content for a completed task. Unknown, working, cancelled, or failed tasks return an error dictionary.

method.name: list_tasks
method.description: Returns all tracked task dictionaries. [param cursor] is accepted for protocol compatibility.
